form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 6 on April 13 over 300m at this track behind Sweet Legs beaten 3.5 lengths (16.90). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Last start finished 6th over 300m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (17.14) behind Raya's Romance in a Grade 6 on April 6. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing sixth (17.09) at this track before going for a 12 weeks spell. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Will need everything to go right.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 350m in 19.53. Followed that up with a minor placing over 350m at this track at Grade 6 four days ago. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by one length in 16.78, beating Hard Style Miss. Last start finished last over 300m at this track beaten 7 lengths (17.01) behind Banjo's Clancy in a Maiden on April 13. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.
